summary: Iter7 full-stack verification. All 4 features work: (P2) race-safe first_paid_at — 2 parallel PATCH status=paid yield exactly ONE referral_reward + exactly +10000 credit to referrer & referred (verified via ThreadPoolExecutor and admin logs count). (P3) Groups CRUD + shared credentials — admin create/list/patch/delete works; PUT/GET/DELETE /admin/groups/{id}/credential works; list includes credential WITHOUT password, GET credential includes password. /me/groups returns full credential (with password) to group members; empty array when user in no group; credential=null when group has none. (P4) PATCH /admin/subscriptions/{id} accepts group_id — verified. Public /api/public/availability (no auth) returns per-service slot metrics with all required fields. POST /waitlist (no auth) creates entry; GET/DELETE /admin/waitlist admin-gated (401 for non-admin). Frontend: admin GroupsTab renders with [admin-tab-groups]/[admin-add-group]/[gm-name/gm-service/gm-save]/[group-credential-*]/[cred-email/cred-password/cred-save]/[group-assign-*] — all present and functional. User dashboard [tab-groups] shows [groups-empty] when no groups and [my-groups] populated with (kamu) marker + [group-credential-*] + [toggle-pw-*] (reveals password) + [copy-pw-*] when assigned. Home service cards show [slot-badge-*]/[slot-bar-*] when service has ≥1 group; [waitlist-cta-*] replaces register CTA when full; WaitlistModal ([waitlist-form]/[waitlist-email]/[waitlist-submit]) submits successfully and shows [waitlist-thanks].

minor.issue: filled_slots counts ALL active subs for the service, including those with group_id=null. This can make filled_slots > total_slots and slot-bar percentage exceed 100% (seen in UI: netflix showed '40/5 SLOT TERISI 800%'). Recommend filtering: subs with group_id != null, or match subs to sum of group host_slots/regular_slots.
Uses full GroupInput (service_id, name, host_slots, regular_slots required) — behaves as replace not partial patch. Non-breaking but inconsistent with PATCH semantics.
EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs (e.g., .local, .test). Not a bug but users testing with common dummy domains hit 422.
CredentialInput.email uses `str` not EmailStr (unlike other endpoints) — allows arbitrary strings. Consider validation.

ui_bugs.issue: Bar width may exceed 100% (800% observed) when filled_slots > total_slots due to backend counting all active subs. Cap Math.min(filled/total, 1) client-side as defensive measure.
pd-tag with bg-[#34C759] + text-white renders with poor contrast on some browsers (badge text was near-invisible in test screenshot). Verify pd-tag utility class does not override bg/text.

issues: When service has no groups (total_slots==0), no slot badge/bar renders at all — user cannot tell if this is unknown vs available. Consider showing neutral 'segera' badge.

action_items: Fix availability filled_slots calculation to match total_slots semantics (count only subs with group_id set, or track filled per group)
Cap slot-bar width client-side to prevent >100% overflow
Consider making PATCH /admin/groups/{id} accept partial body
critical_code_review_comments: Race-safety implementation via atomic filter {first_paid_at: None} + modified_count check is correct. Verified with concurrent PATCHes.
GET /admin/groups strips password via projection {password: 0} — correct. GET /me/groups intentionally returns password to group members — correct per spec.
server.py now 1408 lines — consider splitting groups/waitlist into a separate router alongside existing analytics/referral/webhooks routers.
Availability endpoint: for each service iterates services→groups→subs (N+M queries). Fine for current scale but consider aggregation pipeline as data grows.
GroupsTab.jsx (236 lines) — assign modal loads all subscriptions via GET /admin/subscriptions but filters client-side; on larger datasets add server-side filter by service_id.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 iter7 tests). Full regression 85/87 — 2 flakes (test_iter3 scheduler_dedupe and test_iter5 tier2 — both ConnectTimeout, not iter7 related).
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all requested data-testids present and functional end-to-end (admin CRUD, user groups panel, home slot widget, waitlist modal)

seed_data_creation: Test users prefix 'iter7_' created during pytest + one UI user iter7ui_grp_*. All cleaned up via POST /api/admin/cleanup-test-users?prefix=iter7 (18 users, 10 subs deleted). All Iter7 UI groups deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 fully verified. Backend suite now 87 tests (78 prev + 9 iter7). Run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/ -o addopts='' --tb=short`. Iter7 module: `pytest backend/tests/test_iter7.py`. Only remaining polish: (1) availability filled_slots off-by-N when legacy subs have no group_id — see backend_issues.minor. (2) slot-bar % cap. Twilio still MOCKED as noted.
rca of the issue: N/A — no iter7 regressions. Two non-blocking observations noted in backend_issues.minor and frontend_issues.ui_bugs.
